'''鈭歜-t-k''' ('''kabatak''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yellowen|yellowen]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-t-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yellowen|yellowen]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-t-k
|-
! Lemma
| kabatak
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibatak|thibatak]] || [[word:jibatak|jibatak]] || [[word:shibatak|shibatak]] || [[word:kibatak|kibatak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubatak|thuthubatak]] || [[word:jujubatak|jujubatak]] || [[word:shushubatak|shushubatak]] || [[word:kukubatak|kukubatak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubatak|thubatak]] || [[word:jubatak|jubatak]] || [[word:shubatak|shubatak]] || [[word:kubatak|kubatak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubatak|thubatak]] || [[word:jubatak|jubatak]] || [[word:shubatak|shubatak]] || [[word:kubatak|kubatak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebatak|thebatak]] || [[word:jebatak|jebatak]] || [[word:shebatak|shebatak]] || [[word:kebatak|kebatak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobatak|thothobatak]] || [[word:jojobatak|jojobatak]] || [[word:shoshobatak|shoshobatak]] || [[word:kokobatak|kokobatak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobatak|thobatak]] || [[word:jobatak|jobatak]] || [[word:shobatak|shobatak]] || [[word:kobatak|kobatak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobatak|thobatak]] || [[word:jobatak|jobatak]] || [[word:shobatak|shobatak]] || [[word:kobatak|kobatak]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:batak|batak]] || [[word:batak|batak]] || [[word:batak|batak]] || [[word:batak|batak]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:batak|batak]] || [[word:batak|batak]] || [[word:batak|batak]] || [[word:batak|batak]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:batak|batak]] || [[word:batak|batak]] || [[word:batak|batak]] || [[word:batak|batak]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:batak|batak]] || [[word:batak|batak]] || [[word:batak|batak]] || [[word:batak|batak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙batak|th忙batak]] || [[word:j忙batak|j忙batak]] || [[word:sh忙batak|sh忙batak]] || [[word:k忙batak|k忙batak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabatak|thathabatak]] || [[word:jajabatak|jajabatak]] || [[word:shashabatak|shashabatak]] || [[word:kakabatak|kakabatak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabatak|thabatak]] || [[word:jabatak|jabatak]] || [[word:shabatak|shabatak]] || [[word:kabatak|kabatak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabatak|thabatak]] || [[word:jabatak|jabatak]] || [[word:shabatak|shabatak]] || [[word:kabatak|kabatak]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabatak|shabatak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabatak|goshabatak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabatak|gokishabatak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabatakn眉|shabatakn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabataknkn眉|goshabataknkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabatakn眉|gokishabatakn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabataksh毛|shabataksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabataknksh毛|goshabataknksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabataksh毛|gokishabataksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabatakro|shabatakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabataknkro|goshabataknkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabatakro|gokishabatakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabatakmu|shabatakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabataknkmu|goshabataknkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabatakmu|gokishabatakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabataksher|shabataksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabataknksher|goshabataknksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabataksher|gokishabataksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabatakng|shabatakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabataknkng|goshabataknkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabatakng|gokishabatakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabatakya|shabatakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabataknkya|goshabataknkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabatakya|gokishabatakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabatakyam|shabatakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabataknkyam|goshabataknkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabatakyam|gokishabatakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabatakn眉sh毛|shabatakn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabataknkn眉sh毛|goshabataknkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabatakn眉sh毛|gokishabatakn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabatakn眉ro|shabatakn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabataknkn眉ro|goshabataknkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabatakn眉ro|gokishabatakn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabatakn眉mu|shabatakn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabataknkn眉mu|goshabataknkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabatakn眉mu|gokishabatakn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabataksh毛n眉|shabataksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabataknksh毛n眉|goshabataknksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabataksh毛n眉|gokishabataksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabataksh毛ro|shabataksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabataknksh毛ro|goshabataknksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabataksh毛ro|gokishabataksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabataksh毛mu|shabataksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabataknksh毛mu|goshabataknksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabataksh毛mu|gokishabataksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabatakron眉|shabatakron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabataknkron眉|goshabataknkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabatakron眉|gokishabatakron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabatakrosh毛|shabatakrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabataknkrosh毛|goshabataknkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabatakrosh毛|gokishabatakrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabatakromu|shabatakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabataknkromu|goshabataknkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabatakromu|gokishabatakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabatakmun眉|shabatakmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabataknkmun眉|goshabataknkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabatakmun眉|gokishabatakmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabatakmush毛|shabatakmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabataknkmush毛|goshabataknkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabatakmush毛|gokishabatakmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabatakmuro|shabatakmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabataknkmuro|goshabataknkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabatakmuro|gokishabatakmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
